specific_question: In Q4 2024, how are billing and follow-up communications handled for employees using MediConn Solution through their employer's wellness program?
answer: In Q3 2024, corporate program participants had pre-negotiated rates and simplified billing (charged directly to employer or subsidized), but when the MediConn Solutions audited employee patient call records, it was discovered that 65% of patients didn't understand their specific coverage limits (e.g., 5 sessions per year) or what services required co-pays versus full employer coverage. There are no plans to update communications to decrease this volume of calls.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
